features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Dynamic product display with categories, search, and filtering for gaming top-ups and digital products

features.name: Product Detail & Purchase
features.description: Detailed product view with option selection, quantity management, and checkout flow

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Firebase-based email/password authentication with registration and login flows

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: User profile page with personal info editing, saved game UIDs, and account statistics

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Order tracking, history viewing, and status monitoring for users

features.name: Wallet System
features.description: Digital wallet with balance management, top-up requests, and transaction history

features.name: Balance Transfer
features.description: User-to-user balance transfer functionality with fee calculation

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Multi-payment method support with manual payment instructions and session management

features.name: Coupon System
features.description: Discount coupon validation and application during checkout

features.name: Reseller Application
features.description: Application form for users to become resellers with business details and status tracking

features.name: Reseller Dashboard
features.description: Dedicated reseller panel with wholesale products and separate order tracking

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Comprehensive admin panel with metrics, statistics, and system overview

features.name: Admin Order Management
features.description: Order processing, status updates, refunds, and detailed order viewing

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: User listing, editing, ban/unban functionality, and balance management

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: Product catalog management with category, stock, and pricing controls

features.name: Admin Reseller Management
features.description: Reseller application review, approval/rejection, and reseller product management

features.name: Admin Financial Management
features.description: Wallet request processing, balance transfer monitoring, and transaction tracking

features.name: Admin Content Management
features.description: Banner, notice, payment method, and coupon management

features.name: Navigation System
features.description: Main header navigation with user authentication state and mobile responsive menu

features.name: Floating Support Button
features.description: Fixed support button with WhatsApp and Telegram contact options

features.name: Notice Popup System
features.description: System-wide announcement popup with dismissible interface

features.name: PWA Install Prompt
features.description: Progressive Web App installation prompt for mobile users

features.name: Ban System
features.description: User ban enforcement with overlay preventing banned users from transactions

features.name: Telegram Notifications
features.description: Automated Telegram alerts for orders, wallet requests, and transfers

features.name: Firebase Integration
features.description: Firebase Firestore hooks and utilities for real-time data management

features.name: Animated Backgrounds
features.description: Dynamic gradient backgrounds with animations for reseller panel

features.name: UI Components Library
features.description: Reusable Shadcn UI components including buttons, cards, dialogs, forms, and tables

features.name: Loading States
features.description: Custom loading components for processing, redirecting, and data fetching states

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: In-app notification system for user feedback and alerts

features.name: Responsive Layout System
features.description: Mobile-first responsive design with breakpoint-aware components
